steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The blank needs a verb for the subject many of whom, which is plural (referring to multiple biomedical scientists).

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
The verb must be in plural form. Study is the plural present tense form that agrees with the subject.

The other three—is studying, has studied, and studies—are all singular forms that violate subject-verb agreement.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
